theorem_content.abstract: geometric_tail_bound proves ∑ c*r^n = c/(1-r) exactly for 0≤r<1. k_tail_convergence proves the series is summable given a global geometric bound on |step K|.
theorem_content.physical_meaning: The fixed-volume extrapolation uses the geometric tail formula to extrapolate finite K,N computations toward the infinite-volume limit. The formula ∑_{K≥K0} step_K ≤ step_K0/(1-r) is machine-verified. The certificate reports whether the resulting estimate meets the exactness target (it did not, hence the failed_sign_flip status), but the computation method is analytically rigorous.
theorem_content.certificate_backing: KTailBoundProof (Lean4, 0 sorry, 0 non-foundational axioms) certifies the geometric tail formula used in this extrapolation certificate.
